title: Agent Diagnostics (System Health)
description: System health and performance diagnostics. [FILTERS]: User ID (Global), Session ID (Global), Agent Name (Logs/Handoffs), Tool Name (Performance Charts)

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY user_id
SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY session_id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT tool_name FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_tool_usage` WHERE session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY tool_name
SELECT DISTINCT agent FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_llm_calls` WHERE session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY agent

options.content: 🏠 Home 💰 FinOps ⚙️ Diagnostics 💬 Transcripts 🔎 Traces ❓ Help

panels.title: ⚠️ Total Errors
panels.description: Total count of events with status='ERROR' for the selected user/session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE status = 'ERROR' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: ⌛ Max TTFT (ms)
panels.description: Highest Time To First Token for any LLM call (Greeting or Mid-Session). Helps detect cold starts and reasoning bottlenecks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(CAST(JSON_VALUE(latency_ms, '$.time_to_first_token_ms') AS INT64)) FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE event_type = 'LLM_RESPONSE' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: 💰 Turning Cost (USD)
panels.description: Total estimated cost of LLM calls in the current session/period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(calculated_usd_cost) FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_llm_calls` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: 📈 Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of agent turns that finished without an error.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNTIF(errors_in_turn = 0) / COUNT(*) FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: ⏱️ Turn Latency Attribution (Avg vs P95)
panels.description: Consolidated breakdown of turn latency. Avg shows typical performance; P95 shows the slowness experienced by the worst 5% of interactions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  'LLM Reasoning' as metric, 
  ROUND(AVG(total_llm_latency_ms), 0) as avg_ms, 
  APPROX_QUANTILES(total_llm_latency_ms, 100)[OFFSET(95)] as p95_ms
FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` 
WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Tool Execution', 
  ROUND(AVG(total_tool_latency_ms), 0), 
  APPROX_QUANTILES(total_tool_latency_ms, 100)[OFFSET(95)]
FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` 
WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Agent Overhead', 
  ROUND(AVG(turn_overhead_ms), 0),
  APPROX_QUANTILES(turn_overhead_ms, 100)[OFFSET(95)]
FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` 
WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: 📊 Turn Latency Distribution
panels.description: Bucketized distribution of complete User/Agent interaction durations (Turns). Shows frequency of fast turns vs slow outliers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT turn_duration_ms as value FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}'

panels.title: 📈 Turn Latency Attribution Trend
panels.description: Stacked view of how each turn's time is split between LLM, Tools, and Overhead over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT turn_start as time, total_llm_latency_ms as llm_ms, total_tool_latency_ms as tool_ms, turn_overhead_ms as overhead_ms FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_turn_summary` WHERE $__timeFilter(turn_start) AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' ORDER BY time

panels.title: ⏱️ System Latency Trend (TTFT)
panels.description: Real-time TTFT latency for every LLM turn. Identifies if the LLM is consistently slow or spiking during complex steps.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, CAST(JSON_VALUE(latency_ms, '$.time_to_first_token_ms') AS INT64) as value FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE event_type = 'LLM_RESPONSE' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🔍 Slowest Tools (Avg Ms)
panels.description: Tool names ranked by average execution latency.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tool_name, AVG(latency_ms) as avg_latency FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_tool_usage` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' AND tool_name LIKE '${tool_name:raw}' GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY avg_latency DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 🔀 Orchestrator Handoffs
panels.description: Distribution of requests delegated from the root agent to specialist sub-agents.

targets.rawSql: SELECT assigned_specialist, COUNT(*) as count FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_agent_routing` WHERE event_type = 'LLM_REQUEST' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' AND assigned_specialist LIKE '${agent_name:raw}' GROUP BY assigned_specialist ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: 🛠️ Agent & Tool Distribution
panels.description: Frequency and performance of specific tool calls mapped to agents.

targets.rawSql: SELECT agent, tool_name, COUNT(*) as calls, AVG(latency_ms) as avg_ms FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_tool_usage` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' AND tool_name LIKE '${tool_name:raw}' AND agent LIKE '${agent_name:raw}' GROUP BY agent, tool_name ORDER BY calls DESC

SELECT timestamp as time, raw_user_prompt FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_user_intent` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' ORDER BY time DESC
